title: Cloud Architect(AWS/GOLANG)
description:
Cloud / Solution Architect (Go / AWS)

AWS Architecture & Services

Hands-on experience with the following AWS components:

  • S3, CloudFront, ECS, ECR, API Gateway, Lambda, ALB

  • PostgreSQL, VPC Endpoints, SQS, SES, EventBridge

  • Security services: KMS, Secrets Manager, ACM

  • Networking: VPC, Subnets, Security Groups

  • Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Terraform / Terragrunt

  • Logging, monitoring, and audit management

Application & Integration Architecture

  • Strong foundation in application architecture, database design, integration patterns, and microservices-based systems.

  • Experience designing cloud-native backend services using Golang with a focus on scalability, performance, and security.

Architecture Documentation

  • Ability to produce comprehensive architecture documentation using provided templates and samples.

  • Responsible for clearly detailing system design, AWS resources, data flows, security considerations, and deployment architecture.

CI/CD & Deployment

  • Hands-on experience with GitLab CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and deployment workflows.

  • Experience deploying and maintaining Go-based services in AWS environments.

Programming Skills

  • Strong proficiency in Golang (primary language used in the project) for backend service development.

  • Working knowledge of Python or Java for automation, tooling, or integration purposes.

Technical Leadership

  • Ability to supervise, mentor, and support technical teams to ensure timely and high-quality delivery.

  • Provide architectural guidance and code-level direction, particularly for Go backend services.

System Landscape

  • Frontend: React application with Directus CMS database (co-hosted in a shared AWS account).

  • Backend: Golang-based application, hosted in a new, dedicated AWS account, designed using microservices architecture.

    If you would like to know more about this role, do drop me a message or you can alternatively drop me an email stated below.

    latha@dhc.com.sg

    By submitting an application or your resume, you are deemed to have consented to Dynamic Human Capital Pte Ltd collecting, using and disclosing your personal data for the purposes stated in our privacy notice (https://dhc.com.sg/privacy-policy). You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the terms in our privacy notice.

    Under the revised Employment Agencies Licence Condition 5(b), employment agencies (EAs) are required to collect the personal data (e.g., NRIC, FIN) of applicants referred to employers for permanent or contract job positions of at least 6 months with a fixed monthly salary of $3,300 and above. PDPA requirements on collection, use and disclosure of personal data are not applicable to EAs that are collecting such information, as it is a regulatory requirement.

    https://www.mom.gov.sg/faq/submit-quarterlyreferral-and-placement/are-employmentagencies-allowed-to-collect-personal-data

    We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

    Latha M
    Senior Researcher
    Dynamic Human Capital Pte Ltd,
    2 Kallang Avenue #03-08 CT Hub Singapore 339407

postedCompany.description:
Dynamic Human Capital Pte Ltd (DHC) connects talents to earnest employers who are serious about taking steps to grow together. Working closely with esteemed organizations, we unearth potential gems for each client’s recruitment need.

What we do

Our experience and specialization take us through scores of potential human resources that could be that instrumental player in your organization. As strategic advisors, our goal is to suss out the right personnel to be the right fit in diverse industries.

We pride ourselves with a seamless approach to facilitate the pursuit of individuals who are serious about their career.
